title: breynia cernua var. genuina
intro: Breynia cernua var. genuina, also known as the coral vine or coral plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, with its roots and stems said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Breynia cernua var. genuina include its potential to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, fever, and skin infections, as well as its use in wound healing and as an anti-oxidant. Herbal preparations of Breynia cernua var. genuina include infusions and decoctions made from its roots and stems, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to affected areas.
